description_long: This lantern features an octagonal base with three distinct stepped layers, supporting a raised platform accessible by a set of stairs. The main body consists of an open-sided, octagonal pavilion structure with slender vertical supports and a prominent, faceted conical roof. The roof rises to a sharp point, giving the lantern a striking, architectural silhouette reminiscent of a small urban gazebo or bandstand. The open design suggests that the lantern is intended to house a light source within the central area, allowing illumination to radiate outward. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with a matte, uniform gray finish. The overall form is geometric and modern, with no visible decorative embellishments.
description: A large, octagonal lantern with a stepped base, open-sided pavilion body, and a tall, pointed conical roof in matte gray metal.
description_view_0: The lantern is seen from an angle highlighting the stairs on the right side and the open pavilion structure.
description_view_1: The lantern is viewed head-on with the stairs centered, emphasizing the symmetrical octagonal shape and open entryway.
description_view_2: The stairs are now on the left, with the open pavilion and roof structure clearly visible from a slightly rotated perspective.
description_view_3: The lantern is shown from the rear, with no stairs visible and the open pavilion and roof dominating the view.
